name: Layered Dinner
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Green peas; frozen or fresh
recipeInstructions:
1. Optional vegetables: mushrooms, broccoli, green beans, etc. Layer the vegetables in a large casserole dish in the order given. Use optional vegetables as desired.
2. Mix the ingredients of the sauce together.
3. Pour the sauce over the vegetables.
4. Cover and bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for about 1 hour and 30 minutes.
Helpful Hints: Other vegetables may be used according to your preference. This dish is easy to prepare ahead and can be held in the oven for a company dinner. Serve with whole grains or bread and a green salad.
